actions.label: Echo Hello
actions.description: Simple shell command to test action execution.

actions.label: Reload Reports
actions.description: Reload all configured report files into the view.

actions.label: Save Snapshot
actions.description: Save a history snapshot of current issues.

actions.label: Analyse + Reload
actions.description: Run analysis then reload (simulated with echo + reload). Chains two actions.

actions.label: Grep Errors
actions.description: Search for 'error' keyword in src/ and generate reports/grep-report.json in CodeClimate format.

actions.label: Failing Action
actions.description: Always exits with error — tests the error state display.
